title: Governance Result
description: The result of applying governance rules to a candidate solution.

id.description: Unique identifier for this governance result.

candidate_solution_id.description: Candidate solution this governance result applies to.

status.description: Governance status: PASS, FAIL, BLOCKED, or UNKNOWN.

policy_checks.description: Policy check identifiers that were applied.

blocked_reasons.description: Reasons the candidate was blocked, if applicable.

evidence_refs.description: References to evidence artifacts supporting this governance result.
